language.experimentalNote: Non-English translation is community-contributed and a work in progress. Some text may be untranslated or imperfect.

contentManager.title: Content Manager
contentManager.deletePackConfirm: This will remove this pack and all of its contents from COMP/CON. User data that relies on this content will remain available. Are you sure you want to continue?

v2Import.importAllTooltip: Attempt to import all pending items. Items that are still missing dependencies will remain in a pending state.
v2Import.forceImportAllTooltip: Force import all pending items, stripping any unresolvable dependencies. Use this if you want to get everything imported regardless of missing content, but be aware that the imported items will be stripped of missing data and may need to be manually fixed up after import.
v2Import.deleteConfirm: Delete this pending v2 backup? This action cannot be undone.
v2Import.strippedBody: The following items were removed because they could not be resolved:
v2Import.forceImportNotice: This will import the {type} with all unresolvable items removed. The following dependencies cannot be found and will be stripped:

nav.noNewItemsSaved: NO NEW ITEMS WILL BE SAVED UNTIL THE LIMIT IS INCREASED OR DATA IS DELETED.
nav.storageWarningTooltip: COMP/CON has exceeded the storage warning threshold. More details are available in the Storage tab of the Options Menu.
nav.storageAlertTooltip: COMP/CON has exceeded the maximum storage threshold.
nav.storageDetailsPrefix: More details are available in the

about.title: COMP/CON
about.description: COMP/CON is a free, open-source digital toolkit and gameplay assistant for building and playing LANCER TTRPG games.
about.coreBookInfo: The LANCER CORE Book, COMP/CON, and associated content can be found at

help.howToAddContent: How do I add content from Lancer expansions to COMP/CON?
help.howToSeeExotics: How do I see Exotic Items in the Compendium?
help.cloudAccountFaq: Do I need to pay to make a COMP/CON cloud account?
help.whereAreNpcsBody: If you bought the Lancer Core Book, you'll find a downloadable data package that contains all Core NPC data on the Lancer Core Book's itch.io page, which you can access through the Content Manager. You can use the Content Manager's {installLcp} tab to import the package and start building and running encounters.
help.howToAddContentBody: Official LANCER content can be found on {itchLink} Player-facing LCP content for COMP/CON can be found in the {downloadDemo} section for any Massif Press publication; GM-facing content (i.e. NPCs) can be purchased alongside the PDF content. Links to this content (and featured community content) can also be found in the Content Manager's {lcpDirectory}.
help.howToSeeExoticsBody: To prevent spoilers for players, COMP/CON defaults to hiding Exotic Items. To change their visibility, you can use COMP/CON's {options} menu, and can enable the {showExoticsToggle} toggle.
help.cloudAccountFaqBody: COMP/CON Cloud Accounts are free for all users. For Patreon supporters, cloud accounts gain access to additional features, such as the expanded cloud storage and additional active table instances.
help.additionalHelpBody: The {faqLink} may have an answer to your question! If you still can't find what you're looking for, please stop by {discordLink} (and specifically the #comp-con channel) with your questions or comments for the developers.

credits.patronThanks: The continued development of COMP/CON would not be possible without the generous

achievements.name: Name
achievements.cannotBeUndone: be undone. It is strongly recommended to create a backup first.
achievements.hiddenCount: {count} achievement not shown | {count} achievements not shown
achievements.cannotBeUndoneFull: This {emphasis} be undone. It is strongly recommended to create a backup first.

settingsPage.showExoticsLabel: Show Exotic items in the Compendium
settingsPage.showExoticsTooltip: Enabling this option may reveal campaign spoilers and it is recommended to leave this setting DISABLED if you are not the GM
settingsPage.errorReportingTooltip: Error reporting allows anonymous error data to be sent to the developer to help identify and resolve bugs and other issues.
settingsPage.errorReportingPiiNote: No personally identifiable information is collected at this level.
settingsPage.enhancedReportingTooltip: Enhanced error reporting sends the developer additional data, including {nonAnon}. All other PII is scrubbed before transmission. This is {notNecessary} unless you are actively working with the developer to resolve a specific issue and have been asked to enable this setting.
settingsPage.enhancedReportingPiiNote: non-anonymous information, specifically IP address and user ID
settingsPage.createBackupTooltip: COMP/CON relies on your browser's secure storage to save and load its data. Generally, this data is safe from deletion, but certain browser settings and utilities can sometimes clear this data, resulting in the loss of your COMP/CON data. It's good practice to back up your data from time to time.
settingsPage.downloadV2Tooltip: COMP/CON has saved a complete backup of your v2 COMP/CON data. This can be imported into the v2 app at old.compcon.app.
settingsPage.loadBackupTooltip: .compcon files are COMP/CON bulk export files that contain all of your local data in a single file. You can create a .compcon backup file using the 'Create Data Backup' button. Use this option to load .compcon backup files that you have created or obtained from another source. It is recommended to create a backup before loading a .compcon file, especially if the file came from another source.
settingsPage.mergeWarning: COMP/CON will attempt to merge import data with your existing data.
settingsPage.overwriteWarning: The overwrite strategy will replace all of your existing local data with the data from the imported file and cannot be undone. It is strongly recommended to create a backup before using this option.
settingsPage.v2BackupDescription: This is a v2 COMP/CON backup file. It will be processed using the v2 import system: content packs will be installed first, followed by pilots, NPCs, and encounters. Items that require LCPs not present in this backup will be saved to pending v2 imports in the Content Manager.
settingsPage.v2AppendNote: v2 backup imports are always processed using the "append" strategy.
settingsPage.resetV2Tooltip: Resets the v2 migration status, allowing the V2 Data button to appear again if it was dismissed.

storage.storageUsageSuffix: of your available storage. This includes space reserved by COMP/CON for app management.
storage.neverAutoDeleteFull: COMP/CON will {never} automatically delete data marked for deletion.
storage.warningDescription: COMP/CON will display a warning message when
storage.maxDescription: COMP/CON will prevent the creation of new data after
storage.neverAutoDelete: automatically delete data marked for deletion.
storage.autoDeletePrefix: COMP/CON will permanently delete data after it has been marked as deleted for at least
storage.autoDeleteNote: This will not affect items not already marked for deletion.
storage.noStorageAccess: COMP/CON is unable to access device storage. This may be due to a browser setting or extension. COMP/CON will fall back to using local storage, which is limited to 5MB. This may result in COMP/CON being unable to save data. Please check your browser settings, or allow COMP/CON to access "Persistent Storage" if prompted. If you are using a browser extension that blocks storage access, please disable it for COMP/CON. If neither of these options work, please consider downloading COMP/CON as a PWA.
storage.areYouSure: Are you sure you want to continue?

userDataViewer.description: This is the locally-saved user data. These items should generally not have to be reset, but may be useful in debugging or clearing a persistent loading issue.
userDataViewer.achievementNote: Resetting User Data will not reset achievement unlocks (this can be done in the Achievement Browser).

packInstall.alreadyInstalledWarning: The following content pack(s) are already installed and will be replaced:
packInstall.v3Warning: The following content has not been registered as v3 compatible. These packs will still work, but will not be able to take advantage of v3 features, especially in active mode.
packInstall.dependencyError: The following content pack(s) have uninstalled dependencies and cannot be installed yet. They will be skipped:
packInstall.alreadyInstalledNote: A pack with this same name and author is already installed.
packInstall.willReplace: It will be replaced by this copy.
packInstall.requiresContent: This LCP requires the following content to be installed before it can be added:
packInstall.installingPacks: Installing {count} content pack... | Installing {count} content packs...
packInstall.willUpgradeTo: It will be upgraded to v.{version}

packsDirectory.communityAbout: COMP/CON is proud to collaborate with the LANCER community in making these unofficial content packs available. They are offered as-is at the discretion of the author.
packsDirectory.communityContribute: If you are interested in creating your own homebrew LANCER content, or submitting your content to be featured in this directory, please
packsDirectory.communityNotice: In-app downloading and automatic subscription to community LCP updates are not yet supported. Once the author support tools are available, community LCPs will be migrated to v3 and will be able to take advantage of the same update and subscription mechanisms as official Massif Press content packs. Follow the {blog} to stay up to date on progress.

packConfig.title: Content Configurations
packConfig.description: Content configurations allow you to create and manage sets of LCPs that can be applied to Pilots and NPCs that allow or limit selections to specific content. Pilots and NPCs without configurations set will have access to all installed and activated LCPs
packConfig.applyNote: These configurations can be applied to Pilots and NPCs in their options menus.
packConfig.noLcpsPrefix: No LCPs added. Only content from the
packConfig.removeFromConfig: Remove this pack from the configuration

packInfo.v2ContentDescription: This content pack has not been registered as v3 compatible. This pack will still work correctly, but will not be able to take advantage of v3 features.
packInfo.dependenciesTooltip: Dependencies are other content packs that this pack requires to function properly. They must be installed and activated for this pack to load correctly.

communityTable.v3Compatible: This content pack is compatible with the latest version of COMP/CON and supports v3 features.
communityTable.v3Incompatible: This content pack uses the v2 content format. It will function correctly but will lack features of v3-compatible packs. COMP/CON will not be able to manage effects or statuses from this pack in Active Mode.
communityTable.subscribedTooltip: Currently subscribed to latest updates. Click to unsubscribe.
communityTable.subscribeTooltip: Click to allow COMP/CON to update this LCP whenever a new version is published

v2Auto.autoMigrated: Your v2 data was automatically migrated to v3 on startup.
v2Auto.pendingNote: Pending items can be re-imported from the Content Packs panel after installing the required LCPs.
v2Auto.downloadBackupTooltip: This .compcon file can be used in a v2 environment at https://old.compcon.app. This can be downloaded at any time from the Options menu

migrationRepair.buttonTooltip: Scan for and repair common issues with v2-migrated data.
migrationRepair.experimentalBody: This is an experimental tool that can automatically fix certain common issues with data migrated from v2, but has not yet been thoroughly tested. It is
migrationRepair.experimentalBodySuffix: to make a backup before applying fixes.
migrationRepair.foundFixable: Found {count} fixable issue | Found {count} fixable issues
migrationRepair.andRequiringManual: and {count} issue requiring manual action | and {count} issues requiring manual action

achievementItem.hiddenNote: This achievement is hidden and will be revealed once unlocked

packsList.missingDependencies: This pack is missing one or more dependencies and cannot be activated.

v2ImportNotify.missingDependencies: Missing dependencies are not yet available.

import.missingPacks: Item is missing required content packs. This item will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager, and can be imported once the required content packs are installed and activated.
import.oldVersionWarning: Some data to be imported was created using an older version of COMP/CON and does not include nested content pack information. This data will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager, but cannot be imported until the required content packs are installed and activated. These items can be imported once the required content packs are installed and activated, or force-imported in the Content Manager.

campaign.loginRequiredText: You must be logged in to upload campaign data to the cloud repository.
campaign.managedIn: Imported campaigns are managed in the {library}
campaign.deleteWarn1: This campaign will be {strong}. This action cannot be undone. If you're sure you want to delete
campaign.deleteWarn2: type the campaign title into the text entry field below and click {confirm}.
campaign.importHelp: This tool will import an editable, unpublished Campaign {jsonFile} from your device.{br}To import a published campaign file with the {lcd} extension into your collection, use the file import tool in the {campaignCollection} menu, or the Import Campaign tool in the {manageContent} dialog under the main menu .
campaign.existingNewer: The existing campaign is newer than the imported data.
campaign.overwriteWarn: This import data will overwrite an existing campaign with the same ID ({title}). The existing campaign was last updated on {date}.
campaign.exportEditableHelp: You can export this editable campaign as a JSON file for backup, device transfer, or collaborative editing.
campaign.toProduce: To produce a campaign package suitable for distribution, select {publish} instead.
campaign.notPublishedHelp: This campaign has not been published. Publish a first version of this campaign to export a campaign package via file or share code.
campaign.exportLcdHelp: Download a Lancer Campaign Distributable (.lcd) file that can be imported into another user's COMP/CON
campaign.saveLocalHelp: Save a read-only copy of this campaign into your local Campaign Library for use in active mode or online play
campaign.copyShareCodeHelp: Copy this share code for this campaign to your clipboard. Share codes can be used to import this campaign into another COMP/CON instance.
campaign.generateShareCodeHelp: Upload this campaign to the cloud repository to generate a share code for other users to import this campaign into their COMP/CON instance. Generating a share code will automatically update the cloud repository with the latest version of this campaign whenever a new version is published.
campaign.deletePageConfirm: Do you want to delete the {type} "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

encounter.combatantAddedText: An instance of {name} was added to {encounterName}.

stats.resetConfirm: This will reset all stats to T{tier} {name} default values. Are you sure?

editorFooter.upToDate: Item is up to date with remote changes
editorFooter.downloadRemote: Download all remote changes to this item, overwriting local data.
editorFooter.mustLogin: Must be logged in to update

labelDialog.addOverwrite: This will add {emphasis} the label value for all selected items.
labelDialog.deleteText: This will {emphasis} the label value for all selected items.

sectionEditor.gmOnlyTooltip: Marking a field or item "GM Only" will hide it from player-facing exports and print output
sectionEditor.confirmDelete: Do you want to delete the textItem titled "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

overview.imagesMustLink: Campaign images must be linked, and cannot originate from local COMP/CON data.

pageContent.themeColorsHelp: These colors will change based on the user's selected COMP/CON theme
pageContent.paletteColorsHelp: These colors {strong} change based on the user's selected COMP/CON theme
pageContent.deleteItemConfirm: Do you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

narrativeLink.linkedHelp: This item is currently linked to a Narrative Element in your GM Collection. As modifications are made to the linked element, this item will automatically receive updates. Click the button to unlink this item from the GM Collection and store it as an instanced element in campaign data.
narrativeLink.relinkHelp: To re-link this item, select it in the "Set Narrative Element" menu.
narrativeLink.notLinkedHelp: This item is not linked to a Narrative Element in your GM Collection and will not receive automatic updates, but will be saved as a instanced element in campaign data.
narrativeLink.linkHelp: To link this item to a Narrative Element, select it in the "Set Narrative Element" menu.

map.experimentalWarning: Clicking "Continue" will enable the experimental map editor. The map editor is still under development and is presented in an unfinished state. You may encounter bugs and other rough edges.

combatant.uniqueInstanceHelp: This is a unique instance of this NPC tied to this Encounter data. Editing this NPC will not affect the original NPC data.
combatant.linkedSource: The source of this NPC instance is present in your NPC roster ({name}) and can receive updates from the original
combatant.notLinkedSource: This NPC instance is not linked to a valid source in your NPC roster
combatant.notLinkedSourceDot: This NPC instance is not linked to a valid source in your NPC roster.
combatant.updateInstanceTooltip: Update this instance property to the source
combatant.updateAllTooltip: Update all instance properties to the source
combatant.atPcCountHelp: This NPC will be marked as being part of the encounter only if there are at least as many Player Characters as indicated. Leaving this blank will indicate that is will be part of the encounter at all PC counts.
combatant.onTurnHelp: This NPC will be marked as joining the encounter on the specified turn. Leaving this blank will indicate that this NPC can be used as a reinforcement at the GM's discretion.

sitrep.heading: SITREP
sitrep.modifiedWarning: This sitrep has been modified. Loading a new preset will delete these changes. Are you sure you want to continue?
sitrep.deletePresetConfirm: Delete preset {name}? This cannot be undone.

environment.heading: Environment
environment.modifiedWarning: This environment has been modified. Loading a new preset will delete these changes. Are you sure you want to continue?

encImport.notEncounterFile: The selected file does not contain encounter data.
encImport.name: Name
encImport.missingNpcs: This encounter references NPCs that have not been imported yet. It will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager and can be imported once the required NPCs are available.
encImport.someMissingNpcs: Some encounters reference NPCs that have not been imported yet. These encounters will be saved to the v2 Imports collection in the Content Manager and can be imported once the required NPCs are available.

npcFeature.ignoreLimitHint: Additional features beyond the recommended guidelines can be added by toggling the "Ignore Limit" option above
npcFeature.noneFound: No NPC Features could be found for this selection

npcAlert.selectUpTo: You may select up to {n} additional feature(s)

tier.detectedEdits: COMP/CON has detected edited stat values. How would you like to proceed?

layerSelector.help1: Eidolon data are included with the No Room for a Wallflower Campaign Book and are therefore not included with COMP/CON by default. You can find Eidolon data as additional downloadable content on the {link} Campaign Book page.
layerSelector.help2: If you have already downloaded the Eidolon data, you can import it into COMP/CON via the Content Manager available on the Main Menu or in the Options menu on the right side of the nav bar.

eidolonData.help1: Eidolon data are included with the paid version of No Room for a Wallflower: Act 1, and can be found in the downloadable content section on the {link}
eidolonData.linkText: No Room for a Wallflower: Act 1 itch.io page.
eidolonData.help2: If you have already downloaded the Wallflower GM LCP, you can import it into COMP/CON via the Content Manager available on the Main Menu or in the Options menu on the right side of the nav bar.

npcFeatures.heading: FEATURES
npcFeatures.selectClassToAdd: Select a Class to add Features

featurePrint.weaponAttacks: This weapon can make {count} attacks at a time.

addCombatant.addedText: {name} has been added to the encounter.

mechActions.pilotEjectedText: {name}'s has ejected from the mech and is now IMPAIRED.

npcActions.npcStabilizedText: {name} has cleared all HEAT, is no longer EXPOSED, and has reloaded their weapons.

pcSheet.activeMechChangedText: Active mech changed to {mechName}. Character sheet state has been reset.

roster.title: Add Pilot from Roster
roster.tooltip: Add a pilot from your local Pilot Roster
roster.activeMechTooltip: The active mech will be instantiated for use in this encounter. Once the encounter is started, the active mech cannot be changed without resetting the mech's stats
roster.pilotNoMech: Pilot will be instanced without a mech

encMgr.devNoteReport: This feature is still in development. After-action reports will be expanded in future builds.
encMgr.devNoteLogs: This feature is still in development. Additional data and export options will be available in future builds.
encMgr.deleteArchiveDetail: This will flag the archive for deletion. It will no longer appear in this list, but will be permanently deleted based on your retention options in the Options Menu.

encSummary.requiresPilot: An encounter requires at least one pilot.

newEnc.title: New Local Active Encounter
newEnc.additionalNpcs: Additional NPCs can be added in the Encounter Runner after creation.

tableConfig.note1: name, description, owner info (prepopulate with user info)
tableConfig.note4: if publish, generate link to share

leaveDialog.prompt: Do you want to save this encounter before exiting?

pcEndRound.forfeitActions: Ending the round will forfeit any unused actions.

joinTable.note1: completed/closed tables with history, after action reports, etc.
joinTable.note2: These should be printable/exportable and converted into narrative elements or similar.

pcOptions.warningReplace: Warning: The imported Character Sheet state will replace the current Character Sheet state.

gmOptions.warningReplace: Warning: The imported encounter state will replace the current encounter state.

tableIndex.title: TABLE INDEX
tableIndex.coreOnly: Currently, only Lancer Core Book tables are supported. LCP and custom tables will have to be resolved manually
tableIndex.selectTable: Select a table to view its contents.

runnerItem.bracedDesc: You count as having RESISTANCE to all damage, heat, and burn from the attack that triggered this Brace, and until the end of your next turn, all other attacks against you are made at +1 Difficulty.

addStub.description: Placeholders are ad-hoc stat containers used to track entities within an encounter that aren't in your COMP/CON roster, or, can't be represented within COMP/CON. They can be used for PCs, NPCs, complex encounter elements, environmental hazards, and so forth.
addStub.noPersist: Placeholders do not persist outside of the encounter they are created in.

panelBase.reduceActivations: This will reduce reduced the remaining activations by 1 and reset all actions.

telemetry.devNote: This feature is still in development. Additional telemetry data is forthcoming.
telemetry.collectedNote: Telemetry data is collected at the end of every round

combatAction.alreadyUsed: This action has already been used this turn.

deploy.generateInstance: This will generate and deploy a new instance of {name} for {actor} as a {action}

equipCmd.markUsedHint: Click to mark as {used} . Weapons with the LOADING tag must be reloaded before they can be loaded again

mountBonus.warning: Mount bonus effects on weapon attacks are {not} automatically enforced by COMP/CON. Please ensure you manually apply any relevant effects during gameplay.

unitLoadout.clickToRoll: Click to roll. NPC Features will recharge on rolls equal to or higher than their roll value.

weaponAttack.destroyed: This weapon has been destroyed and must be repaired before it can be activated.
weaponAttack.alreadyActivated: This weapon has already been activated.
weaponAttack.mustReload: It must be reloaded before it can be used again.
weaponAttack.mustRecharge: It must be recharged before it can be used again.
weaponAttack.ordnanceMech: This mech has taken non-Protocol actions this turn. This ordnance weapon cannot be activated.
weaponAttack.ordnanceUnit: This unit has taken non-Protocol actions this turn. This ordnance weapon cannot be activated.
weaponAttack.ordnancePilot: This pilot has taken non-Protocol actions this turn. This ordnance weapon cannot be activated.
weaponAttack.outOfUses: This weapon is out of uses and cannot be activated this turn.
weaponAttack.canMake: This weapon can make {n} attacks per activation.

mechPanel.meltdown: This mech has suffered a reactor meltdown. It is permanently destroyed and cannot be repaired.

pilotPanel.killed: This pilot has been killed in action.
pilotPanel.unconscious: Pilot is unconscious, and any additional damage will kill them.

account.lcpUpdatedText: The latest version of {title} has been downloaded and installed.
account.lcpUpdateErrorText: An error occurred while attempting to download {title}.
account.allLcpsUpdateErrorText: An error occurred while attempting to update your LCPs.
account.syncPartialText: Failed to fully sync {failures} items. This may be due to missing local data.
account.deletionCompleteTitle: {count} Item Permanently Deleted | {count} Items Permanently Deleted
account.flaggedRemovedText: All flagged items have been removed from the cloud.
account.noFlaggedText: No items were flagged for deletion.
account.deletionFailedBulkText: An error occurred while deleting flagged items.
account.collectionErrorText: There was an error updating the collection. Please try again later.
account.collectionUpdatedText: Collection items have been updated successfully.

auth.accountCreated: User Account created successfully. Redirecting to Sign-In.
auth.codeSentToLabel: A verification code was sent to
auth.alreadyHaveCode: I already have a verification code
auth.inputCodeToFinish: Input the verification code to finish creating your account
auth.signupEmailInfo: The e-mail address you input will be used to send you a confirmation code to finalize the creation of your account. From there, your e-mail will only be used to log in to your COMP/CON account.
auth.signupPrivacyInfo: We are committed to keeping your e-mail address confidential. We do not sell, rent, or lease contact data or lists to third parties, and we will never provide your personal information to any third party individual, government agency, or company at any time, for any reason.

ui.directDownloadRequiresAccount: Direct download requires a COMP/CON account
ui.imageDeleteWarning: Please note that this will break any references to this image in your data. This action cannot be undone.

itemLink.lcpHint: If this item is part of a Lancer Content Pack, please ensure that the pack is installed and enabled.

patreon.linkInfo: If you are subscribed to the COMP/CON Patreon, linking your Patreon account will increase your maximum cloud storage space and unlock realtime table creation in GM mode.

syncSettings.cloudFullSync: Cloud storage is full! Unable to sync new data.
syncSettings.syncOverridesNote: The following operations override sync settings and should be used with caution.

collection.distributeWarning: Distributing content that you are not authorized to is against against the COMP/CON terms of service and will result in a ban from the cloud service, deletion of your cloud account and data, and removal and blocking from COMP/CON Patreon membership.
collection.ensureRights: Please ensure you have the rights to distribute any content you add to the cloud service. If in doubt, contact the author of the content.

cloudData.dataTabDesc: PC and GM data stored in your COMP/CON account.
cloudData.imagesTabDesc: All image data you have uploaded to your COMP/CON account.

management.verifyEmailSent: A verification e-mail has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox and enter the verification code below to finalize your changes.

deleteAccount.intro: This tool will delete your account and all associated data. This includes:
deleteAccount.incCloudData: Cloud data, including saved pilots, mechs, and NPCs and other GM data
deleteAccount.incImages: Images uploaded to your personal cloud archive
deleteAccount.incArchives: Account and LCP archives stored on the cloud
deleteAccount.incActiveMode: All remotely stored active mode data and history
deleteAccount.addNoSync: Your save data will no longer sync between devices and browsers
deleteAccount.addShareExpire: Any shared items will no longer update, and all share codes will expire
deleteAccount.addSyncTerminated: Any active syncs will be terminated
deleteAccount.addRemovedTables: You will be removed from any active tables
deleteAccount.addGmTables: If you are a GM, all tables you own will be archived and slated for deletion
deleteAccount.addSubFeed: If you publish a subscription feed, subscribers will no longer be able to receive updates
deleteAccount.notLocalData: Delete any local data on your device
deleteAccount.notPurchases: Revoke any purchases through itch.io or end your Patreon subscription
deleteAccount.irreversible: This action is irreversible. This data will be permanently and irrevocably deleted.
deleteAccount.ensureBackup: Please ensure you have a local backup of any data you wish to keep.
deleteAccount.enterTextToConfirm: Enter the text {phrase} to confirm account deletion.
deleteAccount.deletionInProgress: Deletion in progress. This may take a few moments. COMP/CON will restart once this process is complete.

itch.linkInfo1: Linking your itch.io account will allow you to download Massif content from the itch.io store with one click.
itch.linkInfo2: You can also subscribe to Massif LCPs to auto-update your local copy when the author releases a new version.
itch.purchasesLinked: COMP/CON has linked the following itch.io purchases to your account:
itch.eligibleUpdates: Your COMP/CON cloud account is eligible for the following automatic updates:
itch.manageContentHint: Unlinked LCPs and other content can still be manually added via the {link} page.
itch.noAutoTrack: COMP/CON does not automatically track new itch.io data.
itch.updateHint: If you have new purchases or download keys on your itch.io account click the {update} button below to add these to COMP/CON. Unfortunately, it is not possible to link non-Massif purchases at this time due to limitations in the itch.io API.
itch.lastPolled: COMP/CON last polled your itch account on {date}

subscriptions.unsubscribeInfo: Unsubscribing from this collection will remove it from your collection list. You will no longer receive updates from this author. The local data from this collection will not be removed.
subscriptions.newVersionAvailable: There is a new version of this collection available.
subscriptions.deletedCollectionInfo: The collection "{name}" has been deleted by the author. Although your local data has not been removed, you will no longer receive updates from this collection.

storage.iosWarning: iOS browsers limit storage for websites and may {emphasis} after 7 days of inactivity. To prevent data loss, install COMP/CON to your home screen:
storage.iosStep1: Tap the {share} button {icon} in Safari's toolbar
storage.onceInstalled: Once installed, open COMP/CON from your home screen icon.
storage.noStorageWarning: The current browser does not appear to support persistent storage. It is {recommended} to run COMP/CON on a browser that is capable of storing persistent app data, or, saving and running COMP/CON {pwaLink}
storage.v3StorageWarning: As of the v3 update, COMP/CON requires more local device storage than is available by default. Functionality will be impaired unless COMP/CON is granted the {permission} for this browser.
storage.denialNotice: COMP/CON has detected that persistent storage has been denied for this app. Persistent storage must be enabled for COMP/CON to operate correctly

migration.title: v3 Account Migration
migration.previousError: A previous migration attempt encountered an error. You can retry below.
migration.detectedText: COMP/CON has detected that you have an existing account that has not yet been migrated to the new v3 cloud system.
migration.migrationDesc: {detected} The account migration tool will attempt to transfer all v2 cloud data to the new v3 backend. This process may take some time; please don't refresh or close the page during the migration process. After using this tool (or dismissing it), you can find it again in the "Cloud Data" tab.
migration.v2NotModified: Your v2 data will {not} be modified or deleted by this process.
migration.noData: No importable data was found in your v2 cloud storage.
migration.pilotsPending: {count} pilot pending (missing LCPs) | {count} pilots pending (missing LCPs)
migration.npcsPending: {count} NPC pending (missing LCPs) | {count} NPCs pending (missing LCPs)
migration.encountersPending: {count} encounter pending (missing NPCs) | {count} encounters pending (missing NPCs)
migration.lcpsImported: {count} content pack imported | {count} content packs imported
migration.pendingNote: Pending items can be re-imported from the Content Packs panel after installing the required LCPs.
migration.errorsDuringMigration: {count} error during migration | {count} errors during migration
migration.dismissNote: This panel can be safely dismissed. If you need to retry the migration you can repeat this process from the "Cloud Data" tab.

archive.patreonOnly: Due to the server costs associated the creation and storage of backup data, this feature is only available to Patreon subscribers. If you would like access to automated cloud backups, please consider {link} to support the development of COMP/CON and gain access to additional features.
archive.preventPrune: Prevent this item from being automatically pruned. Preserved archives will still count towards size and space limitations.
archive.removeProtection: Remove auto-delete protections on this item
archive.revertWarning1: This will replace your current COMP/CON data with the data from this archive. This action cannot be automatically undone, so it is strongly recommended that you create a new archive before proceeding.
archive.revertWarning2: This tool only affects your local data. It will not affect any data stored in the cloud.
archive.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this archive? This action cannot be undone.
archive.cloudFullArchive: Cloud storage is full! Unable to create new archives.
archive.settingsDesc1: COMP/CON can create and save a backup of your data at the selected interval. These archives can be used to roll back your data to a previous state.
archive.settingsDesc2: COMP/CON will automatically delete old archives to save space. This process runs whenever a new archive is created, or can be manually triggered by clicking the Prune Items button below.

publishing.accessInfo: Due to the server costs associated with the creation and distribution of these collections, this tool is only available to Patreon subscribers. If you would like to access this tool and create and distribute collections of your COMP/CON content, please consider {link} to support the development of COMP/CON and gain access to additional features.
publishing.howeverView: However, you can still view and subscribe to collections created by other users.
publishing.itemModified: This item has been modified locally and will be updated to the newest version on publishing.
publishing.itemUpToDate: This item is up to date with the version found in local data.
publishing.itemNotFound: This item cannot be found in local data and is unable to be updated. It will persist in the collection until removed.
publishing.removeItemTooltip: Remove this item from this collection. This does not remove the item from your local or cloud storage COMP/CON data.
publishing.mustPublish: Collection must be published to generate a share code.
publishing.deleteCollectionWarning: Deleting this collection will remove the collection from your local and cloud data, and will delete the collection archive from cloud storage. Users will not be able to subscribe to this content and current subscribers will no longer be able to update collection data. It {willNot} delete any collection content, either locally or on the cloud for you or collection subscribers.
publishing.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this collection?

dataItem.remoteItemDesc: This item is linked to another user's data. Changes they make will be downloaded on sync.
dataItem.remoteInaccessibleDesc: This cloud data for this item could not be found. This can happen when the owner deletes the item, or if there was an error during sync. You can attempt to restore the remote link or convert this item to a local copy.
dataItem.remoteLinkBroken: Remote link broken — owner's data not found. Retry or convert to local.
dataItem.editableCampaignDesc: This is an editable campaign you have created in the GM Campaign Editor. This data can be synced to the cloud for safekeeping and sharing with other devices, but are not sharable via the Share Code system.
dataItem.convertToLocalDesc: Remove the remote link. Data is kept locally.
dataItem.restoreItemDesc: Restore this item. This item will no longer be marked as deleted and will sync to this and other devices.
dataItem.deletePermanentlyDesc: This will permanently remove the item from local storage. If the item has been synced to the cloud, it will also be marked as deleted there.
dataItem.deleteImmediatelyDesc: Deleting this item will remove it from cloud storage. This will not modify any local copies of this item.
dataItem.deleteLocalDataDesc: This marks this item as deleted locally, and will be removed from this table and will not be synced. Deleted item recovery options can be found in user settings.
dataItem.deleteCloudItemDesc: Deleting this item will mark it as deleted in the cloud. It will not delete this item locally, but will prevent it from syncing to the cloud or to other devices.
dataItem.chooseDeleteMethod: Choose how to delete the selected items:

import.v2BackupText: {callsign} saved to pending v2 imports in the Content Manager.

export.exportErrorText: COMP/CON was unable to export pilot data

reference.faqErrataNotice: This FAQ and Errata is a community-driven project and is not part of an official Massif Press LANCER release. This page is furnished by FAQ data from the {repoLink} on GitHub, currently maintained by lenaleciel. This document is also available at {siteLink}.
reference.experimentalLangNote: This is an experimental preview of the language selection feature. Non-English translation is currently machine-generated and may be inaccurate.

campaign.developmentPreview: Campaigns are currently in active development and will not be deployed until v3.1. This preview should be ignored for testing, but feel free to explore the existing functionality.
campaign.importHint: Campaigns can be imported via File Import or the Lancer Campaign Directory
campaign.newVersionAvailable: There is a new version of this campaign available. Click the update below to download and install the latest version of this campaign.
campaign.removeConfirm: This will remove the campaign from your collection. Are you sure?
campaign.directoryComingSoon: After v3 release this will be a searchable directory of Massif and community-created campaigns. If you're logged in and have linked an itch.io account, you'll be able to import campaigns directly from the directory. Otherwise you'll be directed to the itch.io page to purchase and download the campaign.
campaign.existingNewer: The existing campaign is newer than the imported data.
campaign.overwriteWarning: This import data will overwrite an existing campaign with the same ID ({title}). The existing campaign was last updated on {date}.
campaign.recommendedForLine: Recommended for {players} players at License Level {levels}
campaign.campaignForLine: A {lancer} campaign for {players} pilots starting at License Level {levels}.

card.deprecated: This item is deprecated and can be removed.
card.weaponAttacks: This weapon can make {count} attacks at a time. Multiple attacks may be made against the same or different targets.

combat.bonusDamageHalved: Bonus Damage will be halved (Area of Effect)
combat.critDamageYes: This damage is rolled as critical damage (roll twice, take highest)
combat.critDamageNo: This damage does not roll as critical damage
combat.apNo: This damage does not ignore armor
combat.irreducibleYes: This damage cannot be reduced in any way
combat.irreducibleNo: This damage can be reduced by the target's defenses
combat.overkillYes: This damage is subject to OVERKILL rules (reroll 1s, add heat (self))
combat.overkillNo: This damage is not subject to OVERKILL rules

clock.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this clock? This action cannot be undone.

brokenRef.partOfPack: This item is part of the following Lancer Content Pack:
brokenRef.instancedNote: This item has been instanced as a unique object and if removed will not be available until the associated LCP is installed.

remote.collectionHelp: This {type} is linked to a content collection. It is read-only and will receive updates when a new version of the collection is published by the collection's author.
remote.remoteHelp: This {type} is a remote resource linked to another user's account. It is read-only and will receive updates from the linked account.

missing.hoverHelp: This {type} is missing necessary LCP data. COMP/CON will not be able to load this {type} until the missing content is added.
missing.eidolonHelp: Eidolons require the installation of the Content Pack provided with {pack}
missing.npcHelp: COMP/CON is unable to load NPC data without the installation of the NPC Content Pack provided with the paid (GM) version of the {pack}
missing.wallflowerPack: No Room for a Wallflower Act 1
missing.usesContent: This item uses content from the {pack} Lancer Content Pack. Equipment from this content pack will be {instanced} until the required LCP is {state} via the Manage Content menu.
missing.requestsNewer: This item requests a version of the {pack} Lancer Content Pack newer than the one that is currently installed.
missing.packActive: The {pack} Lancer Content Pack is installed and active.
missing.otherError: COMP/CON encountered an error while loading this item.
missing.checkLog: Please check the error log in the "Log" tab of the Options menu for more information
missing.gmHelp1: If you have already downloaded the NPC data, you can import it into COMP/CON via the Content Manager available on the Main Menu or in the Options menu on the right side of the nav bar.
missing.gmHelp2: If you purchased a physical copy of the Lancer Core Book, but have not received instructions on how to redeem your copy of the digital version and its associated assets, including core NPC data, please contact Massif Press at {email}
missing.npcDataHelp: NPC data are included with the paid version of the Lancer Core Book and are therefore not included with COMP/CON by default. You can find NPC Class, Template, and Feature data as additional downloadable content on the {link}.

shareImport.userOwned: You are the author of this item. You cannot add your own items as remote resources.
shareImport.alreadyAdded: This item has already been added as a remote resource.
shareImport.qrTypeHelp: This item is a {qr}. It can still be imported, but will appear in the {qr} list, not the {type} list.

rollTable.gmOnlyTooltip: Marking a field or item "GM Only" will hide it from player-facing exports and print output
rollTable.rebuildConfirm: Do you want to rebuild this table? This will clear out the current data. This action cannot be undone.
rollTable.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this table? This action cannot be undone.

relationship.deleteConfirm: Do you want to delete this relationship? This action cannot be undone.

pwa.updateAvailable: A new version of COMP/CON is available.
pwa.offlineReady: COMP/CON is ready for offline use.

license.prereqCumulative: This License requires at least {rank} cumulative Ranks of {source} licenses
license.prereqSingle: This License requires at least one other {source} License at Rank {rank} or above

coreBonus.instancedWarning: This is an instanced item. If removed, this Core bonus will not be available until the associated LCP is installed.

image.dragHelp1: Drag stencil to move crop target, drag handles to resize
image.dragHelp2: Drag image to reposition, mouse wheel to zoom image
image.overCapacity: Your account is over capacity. Free accounts are restricted to {max}MB of storage.
image.patreonNote: In an upcoming release you will be able to link your Patreon account, and COMP/CON supporters will not be subject to any storage limits.
image.remoteGalleryNote: Images in this gallery are links to remote resources and are not managed by COMP/CON. If you do not control the remote host, items may be removed or changed at any time.
